title: Third US Security Expert Sentenced to Prison for Helping Ransomware Gang
summary:
Angelo Martino, a former ransomware negotiator, was sentenced to 70 months for helping the BlackCat/Alphv group.

The post Third US Security Expert Sentenced to Prison for Helping Ransomware Gang appeared first on SecurityWeek.
